errorPage.title: Sorry, an unexpected error occurred.
errorPage.buttonsPrompt: Press one of the following buttons:

profile.makePublicHint: Make your projects public to display them here

about.createAccount: Use the Sign-In button above and look for the "Sign Up" link on the proceeding page to create an account.
about.acknowledgementsIntro: This software uses code from the following open source projects:
about.sinclairRomText: Amstrad have kindly given their permission for the redistribution of their copyrighted material but retain that copyright.
about.intro1: A ZX Spectrum emulator & programming environment for the browser. Source available <srcLink>here</srcLink>.
about.intro2: An alternative website, related to this one, is available at <zxplayLink>zxplay.org</zxplayLink>. ZX Play is a mobile-friendly ZX Spectrum emulator, for games.
about.legal: Please read <privacyLink>privacy policy</privacyLink> and <termsLink>terms of use</termsLink>, for this website.

settings.displayNamePlaceholder: How you want to be greeted
settings.displayNameHelp: This is how you'll be addressed in the app
settings.publicHelp: Your profile and public projects are visible to everyone
settings.privateHelp: Your profile is hidden from public view

avatar.unique: Each pattern is unique to your username.
avatar.tip: Tip: Use arrow buttons to browse more patterns, or click Randomize for a surprise!

editor.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to permanently remove this project?
editor.renameNameHelp: Update or enter text to rename the project.
editor.renameSlugHelp: Optional: Custom URL slug for the project. Leave empty to auto-generate from title.
editor.copyNameHelp: Enter a name for your copy of this project.

feed.loginPrompt: Please log in to view your activity feed
feed.subtitle: Recent projects from users you follow
feed.followHint: Follow other users to see their public projects here

visibility.warning: Making your project public will allow anyone to view and run your code.
visibility.oncePublic: Once public, your project will be accessible via a shareable link. You can make it private again at any time.
visibility.profileNote: Your project will be visible on your public profile if your profile is also public.
